context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the implement-calculator-pattern instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write the spec — contexts per variant, plus the NullService path

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run it — verify it fails because the component does not exist yet

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run again — confirm green, then proceed to the next component

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: raise NotImplementedError, "#{self.class}#compute_result must be implemented"

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Always call `super` in `should_calculate?` to preserve the base guard.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Each spec suite must cover: inactive plan, nil plan, each named variant, and unknown variant. Mirror the same context structure across all concrete services.
